title: No Worldborder Tint
description: Removes the red vignette tint when close to a world border.
body:
# 🚫 No Worldborder Tint
Removes the red vignette tint when close to a world border.

| Vanilla             | Using No Worldborder Tint  |
|---------------------|:--------------------------:|
| ![before](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d74ca130-6782-473b-bd5d-7d5c935d6adb) | ![after](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a2664c62-3702-4337-a2be-5275b9de356b) |

Fabric versions of the mod 1.1.0+ use:
- [MoulConfig](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/MoulConfig)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric-language-kotlin/)

Use `/noworldbordertint` (aliases: `/nwbt`, `/nwt`) or the config button through ModMenu to toggle the tint on or off. 

This is only for Fabric for now but config support is coming for Forge and NeoForge soon.

## ⚙️ Modpack Usage
No Worldborder Tint is free to be used in any custom modpacks as long as credit is provided. I do not permit for any sort of monetisation or generative AI usage.

## 🐛 Issues
If you happen to experience any issues while using this mod, please report it to our [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/Sir-Cow/noWorldborderTint/issues)! Please be as clear as possible when reporting any bugs or issues.
